task: Review Brand DNA document and create brand guidelines summary
notes: Paul has created a Brand DNA doc covering mission, values, ICP. Consolidate into actionable brand guidelines.

task: Define visual identity — colors, typography, imagery style
notes: Countercultural but not aggressive. Nature-forward, warmth, freedom, peace. Distinguish from conventional wellness/headspace vibe.

task: Create brand mood board with retreat imagery
notes: Use Dhammagates retreat photos Paul shared. Nature, campfire, community, silence.

task: Design and build landing page
notes: Must build trust quickly. Include retreat imagery, video, clear value prop. Capture email addresses. Target 30-50% email conversion.

task: Build interactive self-reflection tool (chatbot style)
notes: Paul's 22-question self-assessment redesigned as interactive chatbot/conversational UI instead of long form. Score 1-5, give personalized feedback + growth suggestions. Capture email. Can be ChatGPT-style interface.

task: Create results/feedback engine for self-reflection tool
notes: Based on scores across sections (reactivity, energy/burnout, etc), provide tailored suggestions and resources. Pie chart visualization of results.

task: Create content strategy document for social channels
notes: Channels: YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn. Content should provide value immediately and build trust. Educational, countercultural, not preachy.

task: Define content pillars and themes
notes: Themes from Brand DNA: freedom, peace, simplicity, deep harmony, nature connection, community, counter-consumerism, meditation (redefined).

task: Plan first 500 community members growth strategy
notes: Paul's primary goal — how to get first 500 people into the community. Funnel from content → landing page → email → community → retreat.

task: Design community engagement model (online + offline)
notes: Online ecosystem between IRL events: trainings, teachings, courses, weekly meditation drop-ins. Bridge between retreats.

task: Research and recommend community platform
notes: Need platform for online community that supports courses, live sessions, discussions. Must feel intimate not corporate.

task: Create retreat offering page/brochure
notes: Multi-day deep retreats + single day + half day events. IRL connection, deep teaching, silence. Use Dhammagates venue photos.

task: Design retreat intake questions for website
notes: After self-reflection tool, ask about availability, travel distance, previous personal development experience. Handful of questions only.

task: Map out complete marketing funnel
notes: Outbound content (YouTube/TikTok/LinkedIn) → Landing page → Self-reflection tool → Email capture → Newsletter → Retreat interest → Booking. Automate backend integrations.

task: Set up email newsletter and automation
notes: Monthly newsletter + automated sequences based on self-reflection tool results. Nurture leads toward retreat bookings.

task: Create automated backend integrations
notes: After self-reflection chat: auto-add to newsletter list, send personalized resources based on scores, funnel into retreat interest pipeline.

task: Competitor analysis — meditation/mindfulness communities
notes: Headspace, Calm, Insight Timer, Plum Village, Gaia House, etc. How is Vimutti different? More radical, deeper, countercultural.

task: ICP deep dive and persona creation
notes: Young adults 18-35, internally-pointed, uneasy with consumerism/social media, searching for peace/meaning, may have tried psychedelics/plant medicine, dabbled in meditation/spirituality but want to go deeper.

task: Set up shared Google Drive with organized folders
notes: Paul has docs scattered. Consolidate Brand DNA doc, self-reflection doc, Dhammagates materials, retreat photos into organized structure.

task: Establish regular call cadence
notes: Weekly catchup calls established between Seb, Paul, and Ayrton.
